name: The Count Keeps Chasing After Me!? // Time Travel Scenario~
description:
FEMPOV // Wait…you want me to stay!? But I’m not from this time!

Hey! This is another bot by yours truly lol 

I really like him so far, he's exactly as I pictured him and I love him sm 😭 I know I say that a lot, but I truly don't upload unless I like the character. (Testing with Scenario one made me squeal multiple times. He's the perfect gentleman y'all!!) 

**A little background~** Here in this scenario, you're in the 'real' world still. You just time travelled to 1912. (I left how you got there vague, as well as if you will find a way to stay or go.)

[If anyone was able to guess, I was inspired by: 'The Redemption of Earl Nottingham' to create a bot like this (however my baby is nicer so heheehee) so more scenarios to come later on Venus!] 

anyways~ enjoy!!

***Scenario 1~: SFW***
First meeting. You fell into the world and awaken to his suspicious yet kind gaze. What will you do?
creator: EndangeredBread
